title: Add allow/3 for a spawned Task in an existing test
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/task_spawn_test.exs` spawns a Task via `ReportGenerator.generate_async/0`. That call internally starts a Task under an unlinked `ReportSupervisor` (Task.Supervisor), so the Task is NOT a $callers descendant of the test process. The test fails with `DBConnection.OwnershipError`. Rewrite the fixture to `test/my_app/worker/report_generator_test.exs`: add `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow(MyApp.Repo, self(), task_pid)` AFTER the `generate_async` call (using the returned `task_pid`). Preserve `async: true`.
tier_rationale: Multi-step with real fixture. Requires recognizing the $callers boundary and applying allow/3 to the right pid.
research_citation: "background processes spawned manually, Tasks and GenServers do fail outputting that or similar error to the console" — Elixir Forum, hubertlepicki
